<!-- SECTION: ABOUT -->
## 🧑‍💻 About Me

I'm **Bharat Ji Dubey**, a B.Tech CSE (AI & ML) undergraduate at **Chandigarh University (2025–2029)**.

I enjoy building practical software, AI-powered applications, and modern web solutions while continuously improving my software engineering skills.
